structured_tensions.tension_text: Tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with status-quo-bias when preference for the current state prevents needed adaptation.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when status Quo Bias emphasizes the preference for existing conditions, which can resist the innovative changes needed in the Tradition Vs Innovation Balance.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias when prior commitments harden into overreliance on old methods.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias (commitment and consistency bias) when commitment and Consistency Bias can lead to an over-reliance on traditional methods, hindering the flexibility required for innovation.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams keep collecting support for tradition while ignoring evidence that the balance point should shift.
structured_tensions.source_quote: tradition-vs-innovation-balance conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when teams seek evidence that confirms the existing tradition while dismissing signals that the balance point needs to shift.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
